task_completion.description: Update the publication field for Huffman's paper 'A Method for the Construction of Minimum-Redundancy Codes'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the reference manager GUI, the 'Publication' (or 'Journal') field for the paper 'A Method for the Construction of Minimum-Redundancy Codes' must exactly read 'Proceedings of the IRE'.

task_completion.description: Update the publication field for McCarthy's paper 'Recursive Functions of Symbolic Expressions...'.

integrity.description: The agent used the reference manager's graphical user interface to make the changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the reference manager application (e.g., Zotero) open with the item details pane being edited, rather than terminal commands or raw database files.

integrity.description: The agent did not alter other metadata fields for the modified papers.
integrity.visual_evidence: Fields such as Title, Author, and Year should remain intact and unchanged from their original state for the five edited papers.

integrity.description: The results are displayed within the actual application.
